result:
The data cleaning task has been completed successfully. The cleaned dataset has been written to data/output/cleaned_data.csv with the following variables:
- NSID (cohort member identifier)
- incwhh14 (banded household weekly income at age 14)
- incwhh15 (banded household weekly income at age 15)
- incwhhcnt14 (continuous household weekly income at age 14)
- incwhhcnt15 (continuous household weekly income at age 15)
- incwhh16 (banded household weekly income at age 16)
- incwhh17 (banded household weekly income at age 17)

All missing value codes have been standardized to the scheme:
- -9 = Refusal
- -8 = Don't know/insufficient information
- -1 = Item not applicable
- -3 = Not asked/interviewed
- -2 = Script error/lost
